title: Tender Sweet Vietnamese Elderflower Spring Rolls
description: A sweet and crumbly Vietnamese dish featuring elderflower, these spring rolls are perfect for a light snack or dessert. They are smoke-cold and low-glycemic-friendly.
instructions: Soak the rice paper sheets in cold water for 30 seconds.
In a large bowl, mix together the elderflower syrup, shredded coconut, sliced strawberries, sliced kiwi, and toasted almonds.
Lay a soaked rice paper sheet on a flat surface and place about 1/4 cup of the coconut mixture in the center of the sheet.
Fold the bottom half of the sheet up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the sheet to form a tight cylinder.
Repeat with the remaining rice paper sheets and filling.
In a small bowl, whisk together the honey and lemon juice.
Brush the tops of the spring rolls with the honey-lemon mixture.
Serve the spring rolls chilled, garnished with additional toasted almonds and shredded coconut if desired.
